rationale: The cited paper appears mainly as one entry in a broad literature-positioning table on reward research, where its key finding is briefly summarized alongside many other studies. In the main text, it is only used as a generic example that prior work examined costly value rewards, not as a source for the focal model, hypotheses, measures, or empirical strategy. The citing paper does not build directly on this specific study beyond background context, so the citation functions as a passing/background reference.
